disclaimer: IP fees and processes change. Cabinet Resolution 102 of 2025 introduced new fees effective 14 November 2025. Verify with MOET before filing.

authority.name: Ministry of Economy and Tourism
authority.warning: MOCCAE is Climate Change, NOT IP. The IP authority is MOET. Frequently confused.

process_steps: Trademark search (basic free, paid formal at AED 350)

cabinet_resolution_102_2025.summary: New fee schedule for trademark services.
cabinet_resolution_102_2025.sme_discount_notes: 50% discount on most fees for qualifying SMEs.

wipo_madrid.summary: UAE acceded to the Madrid Protocol on 28 December 2021. Third GCC country after Oman and Bahrain.
wipo_madrid.founder_relevance: Founders can use international trademark filing via WIPO Madrid System once they have a UAE base mark.

uae_patent.notes: Less common than trademark in the founder context.

gcc_patent.name: GCC Patent Office
gcc_patent.notes: Single application covers all 6 GCC member states.

copyright.notes: UAE is a Berne Convention signatory. Registration is not required for copyright protection but is possible for evidentiary purposes via MOET.

wipo_global_brand_database.notes: WIPO Global Brand Database is HTML, no public REST API.

recommended_approach: Ship reference tools with canonical URLs and the fee schedule. Build a calculator for the SME discount. Do not promise programmatic trademark search.
